en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: acʉhʉ ʉmnʉ, ’e te pa’cohivneni ta lema’cohio maitan’e zou ’ola hia bua cou tola ’o’ana.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的鄒語怎麼說。
en: A: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say \\\"Food Chowder\\\".
A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: lema’cohio, o’a os’os’a ta’hongi, teko peela i’vaha engha?
ch: B:老師，我聽不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: aiti eni! maezo a’o ho mo’engho.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: naho cu tuyafa na’a na smaofsusu.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: naho eno yuevaho to smaofsusu ta mimu suepohʉ.
ch: A:請跟坐在一起的同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: tetoc’o ac’ʉhʉ tan’e, tato yupa bobaito ho tena mainsohʉ.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
